prompts.test_flow_step_1: Take this number and multiply it by 2. Respond only with the result. If I didn't say a number, then say 8.
prompts.test_flow_step_2: Take the number you gave me and add 5 to it. Return the new number.
prompts.phase_plan: Please write up an end-to-end, SOLID-compliant plan for this work. No feature flags or progressive rollout. We are in the 'move fast, break things' phase of this product.
prompts.implementation_proceed: Sounds good. Please proceed with implementation.
prompts.implementation_end_to_end: Please implement this plan from end-to-end.
prompts.solid_audit: Please audit your work for compliance with SOLID principles.
prompts.mitigation_plan: Please write a SOLID-compliant plan for addressing the issues identified.
prompts.test_gap_audit: Please audit your work for gaps in test coverage. If no coverage tooling is available, check manually. Suggest a plan for fixing the gaps.
prompts.quality_checks: Please run all relevant tests and quality checks. Run them iteratively, attempt to fix any issues that are fixable, then run the commands again to verify they are fixed. If you face any issues that are not reasonably fixable, document them and let me know.
prompts.playwright:
Could you try to use the playwright-cli skill to validate the behavior yourself?

Please take screenshots to prove the behavior and save them in a folder called .playwright-cli/validation. Make the folder if it doesn't exist.

If you need test credentials, use the credential tooling already configured in your environment. If you need email access, use the mail tooling already configured in your environment.
prompts.commit: Please commit your work. Only commit your own work - do not commit any unrelated changes. If you had to stash any unrelated changes to proceed with your work, please restore them after committing. Please keep your commits compliant with Conventional Commit structure (https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/)

templates.name: Test Flow - say a number
templates.description: For testing workflows without breaking shit or taking too long.
